flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Indian Capital Technology Center-Muskogee fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (99.1% → 74.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Indian Capital Technology Center-Muskogee rose 89% between 2006 and 2009 (51.8% → 97.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Indian Capital Technology Center-Muskogee rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 (150 → 192).
